jd_text: The Technical Director at JASARA PMC is a key leadership position responsible for overseeing all technical aspects of project delivery across a diverse portfolio. This role involves strategic planning, resource management, and ensuring that projects meet industry standards and client expectations. The Technical Director will lead a team of engineers and technical professionals, fostering an innovative and collaborative environment. In this position, the Director will liaise with stakeholders to establish clear project objectives, provide technical guidance, and promote best practices in engineering and project management. Requirements Minimum of 20 years of experience in civil engineering, with a focus on large-scale infrastructure projects Master's Degree in Civil Engineering or a related field is preferred Demonstrable experience in a technical leadership role, preferably within project management consultancies Expertise in project delivery methodologies and best practices in design and construction Strong interpersonal and communication skills, able to effectively collaborate with diverse teams and stakeholders Proven ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously, ensuring quality and timely delivery Sound knowledge of relevant local and international engineering standards and regulations Strong analytical and decision-making skills, with a proactive approach to resolving technical challenges Experience with the implementation of innovative technologies and processes to enhance project outcomes Fluent in English, knowledge of Arabic is an advantage
